response.original_title: Pukam Pukai - To Fetch A Pail Of Water
response.overview: This comedy-drama children’s film follows the summer adventures of an oddball trio as they chase their dreams and unite to build a swimming pool in a water-strapped slum.
response.tagline: To Fetch A Pail Of Water
response.title: Pukam Pukai - To Fetch A Pail Of Water
